Routes._comment: AUTH — Salesforce OAuth2 token endpoint. Consumed by NimbleAMSConnector.ObtainToken (line 307): POST ${LoginURL}/services/oauth2/token. instance_url drives every subsequent call via SFDataBase().
DISCOVER OBJECTS — NimbleAMSConnector.DiscoverObjects (line 212): GET ${SFDataBase}/sobjects/ scoped to NU__ / NUINT__ + Account / Contact via IsNimbleScopedObject.

DISCOVER FIELDS — NimbleAMSConnector.DiscoverFields (line 237): GET /sobjects/{name}/describe. Each response mirrors the deployed IOF set from __mj.IntegrationObjectField. IsPrimaryKey = (type=='id') per connector line 252.
NARROWED DISCOVERY — DiscoverNarrowedRoutes: same as the main sobjects route but omits NU__Donation__c, used to test absent-object deactivation in cell E1.

DiscoverNarrowedRoutes._comment: Narrowed discovery omits NU__Donation__c — triggers absent-object deactivation overlay.

DeltaPasses._comment: DeltaPass on NU__Membership__c: row1 updated (NU__Status__c='updated-delta'), row3 deleted (IsDeleted=true), row2 unchanged. Tests watermark-advance, update detection, and delete detection via IsDeleted flag (NimbleAMSConnector.RawToExternalRecord line 717: IsDeleted===true → ExternalRecord.IsDeleted=true).
